summary.en: EMC Directive 2014/30/EU applies in Sweden as it does across the EU. Heat pumps must comply with electromagnetic emission limits under harmonised standard EN 55014-1:2021 (conducted and radiated emission limits for household appliances, electric tools, and similar apparatus). EN 61000-3-2 limits harmonic current injection into the 230/400 V 50 Hz Swedish public supply network. EN 61000-3-3 limits voltage fluctuations and flicker. SIS (Swedish Institute for Standards) is the Swedish national standards body that publishes the SS-EN adoptions of these harmonised standards. CE marking under the EMC Directive is mandatory for market access in Sweden.
summary.zh: 电磁兼容指令2014/30/EU在瑞典与欧盟其他成员国同样适用。热泵须符合协调标准EN 55014-1:2021（家用电器、电动工具及类似器具的传导和辐射发射限值）规定的电磁发射限值。EN 61000-3-2限制向瑞典230/400 V 50 Hz公共电网注入的谐波电流。EN 61000-3-3限制电压波动和闪烁。SIS（瑞典标准协会）作为瑞典国家标准化机构，负责发布这些协调标准的SS-EN版本。依据EMC指令取得CE标志是进入瑞典市场的强制要求。
summary.zht: 電磁相容指令2014/30/EU在瑞典與歐盟其他成員國同樣適用。熱泵須符合協調標準EN 55014-1:2021（家用電器、電動工具及類似器具的傳導和輻射發射限值）規定的電磁發射限值。EN 61000-3-2限制向瑞典230/400 V 50 Hz公共電網注入的諧波電流。EN 61000-3-3限制電壓波動和閃爍。SIS（瑞典標準協會）作為瑞典國家標準化機構，負責發布這些協調標準的SS-EN版本。依據EMC指令取得CE標誌是進入瑞典市場的強制要求。

summary.en: GB 4343.1-2018 (Electromagnetic disturbance characteristics of household electrical appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus — Part 1: Emission) is China's national adoption of CISPR 14-1. GB/T 17625.1 (IEC 61000-3-2 adoption) and GB/T 17625.2 (IEC 61000-3-3 adoption) cover harmonic current and flicker. EMC emission testing is included under CCC certification for domestic appliances, conducted at CNAS/CMA accredited laboratories. These share IEC/CISPR lineage with EU harmonised standards but Chinese test reports are not accepted as EU EMC Directive conformity evidence.
summary.zh: GB 4343.1-2018（家用电器、电动工具和类似器具的电磁骚扰特性——第1部分：发射）是中国对CISPR 14-1的国家采标。GB/T 17625.1（IEC 61000-3-2采标）和GB/T 17625.2（IEC 61000-3-3采标）分别涵盖谐波电流和闪烁。电磁发射测试纳入家用电器CCC认证范围，由CNAS/CMA认可实验室进行。这些标准与欧盟协调标准同源于IEC/CISPR，但中国测试报告不被接受为欧盟EMC指令合规证明。
summary.zht: GB 4343.1-2018（家用電器、電動工具和類似器具的電磁騷擾特性——第1部分：發射）是中國對CISPR 14-1的國家採標。GB/T 17625.1（IEC 61000-3-2採標）和GB/T 17625.2（IEC 61000-3-3採標）分別涵蓋諧波電流和閃爍。電磁發射測試納入家用電器CCC認證範圍，由CNAS/CMA認可實驗室進行。這些標準與歐盟協調標準同源於IEC/CISPR，但中國測試報告不被接受為歐盟EMC指令合規證明。

gap.en: Although GB 4343.1-2018 and EN 55014-1:2021 share a common CISPR 14-1 lineage, Chinese CCC test reports under GB 4343.1 are not accepted as evidence of EMC Directive conformity in Sweden or anywhere in the EU. Re-testing to EN 55014-1:2021, EN 61000-3-2, and EN 61000-3-3 at an EU-recognised laboratory is required, along with a new EU Declaration of Conformity. Sweden's 230/400 V 50 Hz grid is identical to the general EU reference so no additional local derating applies.
gap.zh: 尽管GB 4343.1-2018和EN 55014-1:2021同源于CISPR 14-1，但基于GB 4343.1的中国CCC测试报告不被接受为在瑞典或欧盟任何成员国的EMC指令合规证明。需在欧盟认可实验室按EN 55014-1:2021、EN 61000-3-2和EN 61000-3-3重新测试，并出具新的欧盟符合性声明。瑞典采用230/400 V 50 Hz电网，与欧盟通用参考电网相同，无需额外的本地降额处理。
gap.zht: 儘管GB 4343.1-2018和EN 55014-1:2021同源於CISPR 14-1，但基於GB 4343.1的中國CCC測試報告不被接受為在瑞典或歐盟任何成員國的EMC指令合規證明。需在歐盟認可實驗室按EN 55014-1:2021、EN 61000-3-2和EN 61000-3-3重新測試，並出具新的歐盟符合性聲明。瑞典採用230/400 V 50 Hz電網，與歐盟通用參考電網相同，無需額外的本地降額處理。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory (EU EMC Directive CE marking required; applies in Sweden as EU member state)
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (CCC certification includes EMC emission testing)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Gap — re-testing to EN 55014-1:2021, EN 61000-3-2, and EN 61000-3-3 required; GB 4343.1 CCC test reports not accepted as EU EMC Directive conformity evidence in Sweden.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 存在差距——需按EN 55014-1:2021、EN 61000-3-2和EN 61000-3-3重新测试；GB 4343.1 CCC测试报告在瑞典不被接受为欧盟EMC指令合规证明。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 存在差距——需按EN 55014-1:2021、EN 61000-3-2和EN 61000-3-3重新測試；GB 4343.1 CCC測試報告在瑞典不被接受為歐盟EMC指令合規證明。

requirement_topic.en: Radio Equipment Directive — Wireless-enabled Heat Pump Controls (RED 2014/53/EU)
requirement_topic.zh: 无线电设备指令——具有无线功能的热泵控制系统（RED 2014/53/EU）
requirement_topic.zht: 無線電設備指令——具有無線功能的熱泵控制系統（RED 2014/53/EU）

summary.en: Heat pumps incorporating wireless communication features — including Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, Zigbee, or proprietary smart-home radio interfaces — fall under the Radio Equipment Directive 2014/53/EU (RED) in addition to the EMC Directive. RED requires demonstration of radio spectrum efficient use, protection of the frequency spectrum, and interoperability. Harmonised standards under RED (e.g., ETSI EN 300 328 for 2.4 GHz Wi-Fi, ETSI EN 303 480 for smart metering radio) apply. The Swedish Post and Telecom Authority (PTS) enforces RED in Sweden. CE marking under RED must be applied and a Declaration of Conformity issued.
summary.zh: 内置无线通信功能（包括Wi-Fi、蓝牙、Zigbee或专有智能家居无线接口）的热泵，除须符合EMC指令外，还须符合无线电设备指令2014/53/EU（RED）。RED要求证明无线频谱的有效使用、频谱保护及互操作性。RED下适用的协调标准（如适用于2.4 GHz Wi-Fi的ETSI EN 300 328、适用于智能计量无线的ETSI EN 303 480）须予以满足。瑞典邮政和电信管理局（PTS）负责在瑞典执行RED。须加贴RED下的CE标志并出具符合性声明。
summary.zht: 內置無線通信功能（包括Wi-Fi、藍牙、Zigbee或專有智能家居無線接口）的熱泵，除須符合EMC指令外，還須符合無線電設備指令2014/53/EU（RED）。RED要求證明無線頻譜的有效使用、頻譜保護及互操作性。RED下適用的協調標準（如適用於2.4 GHz Wi-Fi的ETSI EN 300 328、適用於智能計量無線的ETSI EN 303 480）須予以滿足。瑞典郵政和電信管理局（PTS）負責在瑞典執行RED。須加貼RED下的CE標誌並出具符合性聲明。

summary.en: In China, radio transmitters in equipment require SRRC (State Radio Regulation Committee) type approval under the Radio Regulations of the PRC. MIIT SRRC certification covers radio frequency approval for embedded wireless modules. Chinese SRRC approval is specific to Chinese radio frequency allocations and is not equivalent to or recognised under the EU Radio Equipment Directive. Chinese wireless heat pump controllers may use frequency bands or power levels not harmonised with European spectrum allocations.
summary.zh: 在中国，设备中的无线电发射器须按《中华人民共和国无线电管理条例》取得国家无线电管理委员会（SRRC）型号核准。工业和信息化部SRRC认证涵盖嵌入式无线模块的射频批准。中国SRRC批准针对中国无线电频率分配，与欧盟无线电设备指令不等效且不被认可。中国无线热泵控制器可能使用与欧洲频谱分配不协调的频段或功率等级。
summary.zht: 在中國，設備中的無線電發射器須按《中華人民共和國無線電管理條例》取得國家無線電管理委員會（SRRC）型號核准。工業和信息化部SRRC認證涵蓋嵌入式無線模組的射頻批准。中國SRRC批准針對中國無線電頻率分配，與歐盟無線電設備指令不等效且不被認可。中國無線熱泵控制器可能使用與歐洲頻譜分配不協調的頻段或功率等級。

standards_or_laws: SRRC type approval (MIIT — PRC Radio Regulations)
GB/T 22450 series (wireless communication for domestic appliances)

gap.en: SRRC certification does not substitute RED CE marking. If the heat pump includes any embedded wireless radio interface, separate EU RED conformity assessment against applicable ETSI harmonised standards is required. Frequency band allocations and maximum permitted power levels may differ between China and Sweden, potentially requiring hardware changes to the wireless module. A new EU Declaration of Conformity under RED must be issued before the product can be sold in Sweden.
gap.zh: SRRC认证不能替代RED下的CE标志。若热泵包含任何嵌入式无线射频接口，须按适用的ETSI协调标准进行独立的欧盟RED合规评估。中国与瑞典的频段分配和最大许用功率等级可能不同，可能需要对无线模块进行硬件改造。产品在瑞典销售前须出具RED下的新欧盟符合性声明。
gap.zht: SRRC認證不能替代RED下的CE標誌。若熱泵包含任何嵌入式無線射頻接口，須按適用的ETSI協調標準進行獨立的歐盟RED合規評估。中國與瑞典的頻段分配和最大許用功率等級可能不同，可能需要對無線模組進行硬件改造。產品在瑞典銷售前須出具RED下的新歐盟符合性聲明。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where wireless features are present (EU RED CE marking required in Sweden)
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (SRRC type approval required for radio transmitters in China)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Gap — SRRC certification not accepted under RED; separate EU RED conformity assessment and CE marking required for any heat pump with wireless communication features sold in Sweden.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 存在差距——SRRC认证在RED下不被接受；在瑞典销售的任何带无线通信功能的热泵须进行独立的欧盟RED合规评估并取得CE标志。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 存在差距——SRRC認證在RED下不被接受；在瑞典銷售的任何帶無線通信功能的熱泵須進行獨立的歐盟RED合規評估並取得CE標誌。
